Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order Dismissing X-Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Steven Miyake, Esq (415-421-4400) for Cross Defendant and moving party Heather Hyons.
Gino Molinari, Esq (415-863-3797) for Defendant and opposing party Jacqueline Young-De Roover.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT HEATHER HYRONS Motion For Order Dismissing X-Complaint is GRANTED as to the First and Second Causes of Action, and the First and Second Causes of Action are dismissed with prejudice as to cross-defendant Hyrons only. Request for sanctions is DENIED. Code of Civil Procedure 128.5 is not applicable to the Complaint/Proceedings initiated after December 31, 1994. Cross-Defendant Hyrons should file and serve her answer to the cross-complaint within 5 days of the date of the order. Order is signed in Open Court. (see scanned order for details. Judge: Lillian K. Sing, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
